title: Coating plates

steps: Thaw aliquoted VTN On ice . Each 6-well plate needs 60 µl VTN.
Add the diluted VTN to each well, shake and tilt the plate so the VTN solution covers the entire well.
For each well of 6-well plate, dilute 10 µl VTN in 1 ml pre-chilled DPBS.
Thaw sufficient Matrigel On ice to coat plates (100 µl Matrigel/6-well plate)
Pipet 100 µl Matrigel into 6 ml cold DMEM/F12
Quickly transfer 1 ml/well of diluted Matrigel to 6-well plate.
Distribute Matrigel evenly across the surface.
Incubate plates at 37 °C for 01:00:00 Any plates not immediately used can be sealed with Parafilm and stored at 4 °C for 2 weeks.
Remove excess Matrigel and wash with DPBS.
Immediately plate cells at the desired density.
Thaw sufficient Geltrex on ice to coat plates (120 µl/6-well plate)
Dilute Geltrex 1:50 with cold DMEM/F12 (120 µl Geltrex into 6 ml DMEM/F12)
Quickly transfer 1 ml/well of diluted Geltrex to 6-well plate.
Distribute Geltrex evenly across the surface.
Remove excess liquid from the Geltrex coated plate.
Immediately plate cells at the desired density.
creator: Hanqin Li
